Selected Work

01 — Project Type

Borders

Artfully composed garden borders that layer texture, colour, and seasonal interest through carefully selected perennials and structural plantings.

02 — Project Type

Vegetable Gardens

Productive kitchen gardens designed for both beauty and abundance — from raised bed layouts to full potager-style installations.

03 — Project Type

Pruning Projects

Expert structural and aesthetic pruning that shapes woody plants to their finest form while supporting long-term vitality.

04 — Project Type

Garden Beds

Designed and installed with intention — from soil preparation to plant selection, creating beds that thrive season after season.

05 — Project Type

Rejuvenation Plantings

Breathing new life into overgrown or neglected gardens through thoughtful editing, replanting, and restorative care.

06 — Additional

Bespoke Consultations

Tailored one-on-one sessions for clients seeking expert horticultural guidance, design direction, and personalised care plans.

Featured Project

Un-farm

Project Overview

To restore former cow pastures to a healthy, thriving ecosystem for birds and wildlife — as well as the enjoyment of the homeowners. The goal was to create drama on a larger scale while also providing a backbone of strong foundational plantings around the main house. Style  Woodland with some English elements — wild, but also maintained.   Challenges  Excessive wind, high drainage, excessive heat, excessive cold, low nutrient soil, low organic matter, intense environmental pressure, insect damage, cicada bloom.

Phase 01

Beginning

The garden as it was — documenting the existing conditions prior to design intervention.

ii.

About

A lifelong gardener and professional horticulturist with over 20 years of experience in the high-end private sector, my style blends naturalistic planting design with a deep dedication to grooming the landscape as it grows, promoting the long-term health and beauty of the garden.

I strive to build personal relationships with clients that extend well beyond the professional care of their garden. Through decades of working hands-on alongside landscape architects and designers who take the utmost pride in their craft, I have developed the skills to take a landscape from an initial idea all the way through to planting.

"The real joy begins when I bring a vision to life with skilled hands — nurturing the garden to its fullest potential."
